quality.rationale: 正交曲线坐标梯度推导涉及度规求逆与物理基变换，逻辑链条完整且可无缝迁移至球坐标、柱坐标等任意尺度因子体系

origin.question: Problem 8.22. Vector analysis in 3-dimensional orthogonal curvilinear coordinates is a special case of tensor analysis where $\mathbf{g}_{ij} = \mathbf{h}_i^2\delta_{ij}$ (not summed). The $\mathbf{h}_i$ 's are functions of the coordinates called "scale factors". Vector components are often referred to the ("physical") orthonormal basis $\tilde{\pmb{\omega}}^{\hat{\mathbf{i}}} = \mathbf{h}_i\widetilde{\mathbf{dx}}^{\hat{\mathbf{i}}}$ (not summed). Derive expressions for (i) $\nabla S$ ,
origin.solution:
在一般曲线坐标下，标量场 $S$ 的梯度向量定义为 $(
abla S)^j = g^{ji} \partial_i S$。已知度规为对角形式 $g_{ij} = h_i^2 \delta_{ij}$（无求和约定），其逆度规分量为 $g^{ij} =  rac{1}{h_i^2} \delta^{ij}$。因此，梯度的逆变分量为 $(
abla S)^i =  rac{1}{h_i^2}  rac{\partial S}{\partial x^i}$。题目指出物理正交基矢量与坐标基矢量的关系为 $\mathbf{e}_{\hat{i}} =  rac{1}{h_i} \mathbf{e}_i$（或等价地 $\mathbf{e}_i = h_i \mathbf{e}_{\hat{i}}$）。将坐标基替换为物理基，梯度向量可写为：$
abla S = (
abla S)^i \mathbf{e}_i = \left(  rac{1}{h_i^2}  rac{\partial S}{\partial x^i}ight) (h_i \mathbf{e}_{\hat{i}}) =  rac{1}{h_i}  rac{\partial S}{\partial x^i} \mathbf{e}_{\hat{i}}$。对 $i=1,2,3$ 求和即得最终表达式：$
abla S = \sum_{i=1}^3  rac{1}{h_i}  rac{\partial S}{\partial x^i} \mathbf{e}_{\hat{i}}$。
